column1: # Final Radiant standalone extraction inventory for OPT-269.
# This inventory classifies every current Rust source, test, or example file
# under this crate that still contains Sempal-domain terminology. It is not the
# active backlog; Linear is. The issue column points at the implementation
# ticket that owns the final disposition.
# - pattern: exact path under the Radiant crate, or a directory prefix ending in /**
# - issue: Linear issue that owns the final disposition
